description: REQ-FEED-010 Edge Cases: 'ツールチップ: 無効化された削除ボタンには title または aria-label として「編集を終了してから削除してください」を設定する'. Implementation hard-codes aria-label='削除' regardless of disabled state and never sets a tooltip (title) attribute. A user who Tab-focuses a disabled delete button hears only '削除' from the screen reader with no explanation of why action is unavailable. Test FeedRow.dom.vitest.ts:322-334 only checks aria-label exists and is non-empty; it does not verify the disabled-state messaging, so coverage is illusory.

evidence.snippet:
<button
  data-testid="delete-button"
  aria-label="削除"
  disabled={deleteDisabled}
  aria-disabled={deleteDisabled ? 'true' : 'false'}
  onclick={handleDeleteClick}
  class="delete-button"
>

recommendation: Make aria-label and/or title dynamic: when `deleteDisabled === true`, set title='編集を終了してから削除してください' (and consider aria-label of same string). Add a DOM assertion verifying the disabled-state message is exposed.
